content.text:
Hi there! 👋 Welcome to Dreamer!

I'm your game creation assistant. I can help you build complete 2D games from scratch — just describe what you have in mind!

Here are some ideas to get you started:

- 🏓 **Pong** — Classic two-player paddle game
- 🐍 **Snake** — Grow your snake and avoid walls
- 👾 **Space Invaders** — Shoot waves of alien enemies
- 🍄 **Platformer** — Side-scrolling jump and run
- 🧱 **Breakout** — Bounce a ball to break bricks

Or describe your own game idea and I'll bring it to life! What would you like to create? 🎮

assistantText:
Hi there! 👋 Welcome to Dreamer!

I'm your game creation assistant. I can help you build complete 2D games from scratch — just describe what you have in mind!

Here are some ideas to get you started:

- 🏓 **Pong** — Classic two-player paddle game
- 🐍 **Snake** — Grow your snake and avoid walls
- 👾 **Space Invaders** — Shoot waves of alien enemies
- 🍄 **Platformer** — Side-scrolling jump and run

Or describe your own game idea and I'll bring it to life! What would you like to create? 🎮
